jsonLd.title: Bewakoof is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bewakoof! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bewakoof:
Bewakoof is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
